subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Most Merciful, Most Bountiful! Lead Thy servants to the wellspring of life eternal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوندا رحیما کریما عبادت را بسر چشمه حیات ابدی برسان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
